A.label: Strongest
types: UN bodies (Commission of Inquiry on Syria, IIIM, OHCHR) and UN-mandated reports
Court records, indictments, judgments (national/international, incl. universal-jurisdiction cases)
Official sanctions lists (UN, EU, US OFAC, UK, etc.)

B.label: Strong
types: Reports by recognized human-rights organizations with documented methodology
Official legal filings and prosecutorial documents

C.label: Corroboration required (never sole basis for a strong claim)
types: Credible investigative journalism from established outlets
Verified public documentation (authenticated photo/video/document with provenance)

not_accepted: Anything that cannot be independently checked
